title: Smoky Greek Oat Cakes
description: Crunchy oat cakes infused with smoky flavor, perfect as a snack or appetizer.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together oats, smoky Greek seasoning, and salt.
In a separate bowl, beat eggs and mix in grated cheese (if using).
Add the egg mixture to the oat mixture and stir until combined.
Using a 1/4 cup measuring cup, scoop the mixture into balls and flatten slightly.
Place the oat cakes on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 18-20 minutes, or until golden brown and crispy.
Remove from oven and let cool for 5 minutes.
Serve warm, garnished with additional smoky Greek seasoning if desired.
